title: CashflowAI
intent: Near-term cash position forecasting and shortfall mitigation automation
requirements: positions module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
forecasts module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
shortfalls module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
mitigations module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
scenarios module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
events module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
constraints: No user feedback loops; autonomous operation only
No TODO/stub placeholders in production paths
acceptance_criteria: All listed modules available in UI + API
